---
title: Additional Notes
---

## Field Types

Field types use Parquet-style names: boolean, date, float, integer, string,
time, timestamp. For string columns that behave as factors, the possible values
are listed.

## Cumulative Fields

Cumulative fields only increase within a window and then reset. They are called
out explicitly in each table entry. Never sum cumulative fields across rows;
take the latest value for the window you need. See the cookbook
[Notes](../cookbook/notes.qmd) for guidance on selecting the right cumulative
column for a given reporting window.

## Proportions

Proportions are stored as values between 0 and 1, not 0 and 100.
